performed_activity_evidence: MAR administration plus infusion start/stop evidence
required_documentation_elements: Drug, dose, route, start time, stop time
common_failure_mode: Missing stop time or unclear duration
why_it_may_not_be_billable: Documented duration may not support an infusion-level charge

performed_activity_evidence: Hydration administration timestamps plus nursing support
required_documentation_elements: Reason for hydration, distinct hydration timing, start/stop time
common_failure_mode: Hydration documented but not distinct from primary therapy
why_it_may_not_be_billable: Hydration may be conditional or integral rather than separately billable

performed_activity_evidence: Pharmacy prep record plus documented discarded amount
required_documentation_elements: Drug identity, administered amount, discarded amount, waste support
common_modifier_logic: Waste modifier when support requirements are met
why_it_may_not_be_billable: Waste may be unsupported or below threshold for separate billing

performed_activity_evidence: MAR administration plus governed infusion duration
required_documentation_elements: Drug, start time, stop time, administered duration
expected_facility_charge_opportunity: Timed infusion units derived from documented duration
common_modifier_logic: Units review when timed duration crosses threshold
common_failure_mode: Documented infusion duration was not translated into governed expected units
why_it_may_not_be_billable: Documented duration may support fewer or more timed units than a default charge

performed_activity_evidence: Access-site administration note linked to same-day infusion
required_documentation_elements: Access site, timing, distinct support from primary infusion
common_failure_mode: Access-site activity documented but not sufficiently distinct from the primary infusion
why_it_may_not_be_billable: Access-site activity may be integral to the primary infusion encounter

performed_activity_evidence: Study completion status plus performed exam record
required_documentation_elements: Completed study status, performed exam code, service timestamp
common_failure_mode: Order exists but study never reached completed status
why_it_may_not_be_billable: Initiated or scheduled imaging alone does not create a valid charge opportunity

performed_activity_evidence: Started exam workflow plus incomplete study note
required_documentation_elements: Incomplete or discontinued status, reason, partial performed evidence
expected_facility_charge_opportunity: No routine separate charge opportunity or reduced local charge
common_failure_mode: Incomplete study treated as a normal completed exam
why_it_may_not_be_billable: The study may not meet technical completion criteria for billing

performed_activity_evidence: Completed study record with site and laterality support
required_documentation_elements: Completed study status, site, laterality, service timestamp
common_failure_mode: Site or laterality support is missing for a billed technical study
why_it_may_not_be_billable: The study may not support the billed technical line without site or laterality evidence

performed_activity_evidence: Same-day repeat study record with distinct support
required_documentation_elements: Distinct same-day study context, repeat exam support, service timestamp
common_modifier_logic: Distinct-study modifier or local repeat logic
common_failure_mode: Same-day repeat study lacks governed distinctness support
why_it_may_not_be_billable: Same-day repeat imaging may not support a separate technical line without distinctness evidence

performed_activity_evidence: Procedure completion plus linked device or contrast evidence
required_documentation_elements: Completed case, linked device or contrast record, timing support
expected_facility_charge_opportunity: Device or contrast-related technical charge when local rules allow
common_failure_mode: Supply or contrast records are present but not linked
why_it_may_not_be_billable: The item may be bundled into the primary technical service

department: OR / Hospital Outpatient Surgery / Procedural Areas
performed_activity_evidence: Case completion status plus room and procedure log
required_documentation_elements: Completed case status, primary procedure support, start/stop timestamps
common_modifier_logic: Distinctness or reduced-service modifier where governed
common_failure_mode: Case complete but charge posting delayed during reconciliation
why_it_may_not_be_billable: Final clean billing may still depend on completed documentation and final case state

department: OR / Hospital Outpatient Surgery / Procedural Areas
performed_activity_evidence: Discontinued case state plus partial procedure note
required_documentation_elements: Discontinued status, reason, extent performed, operative support
expected_facility_charge_opportunity: Reduced partial charge or no charge depending on local rule
common_modifier_logic: Reduced or discontinued modifier where governed
common_failure_mode: Discontinued case routed as full missed primary procedure
why_it_may_not_be_billable: The discontinued case may not support the full expected charge

department: OR / Hospital Outpatient Surgery / Procedural Areas
performed_activity_evidence: Implant log or supply usage linked to completed case
required_documentation_elements: Item identity, quantity, timing, case linkage
expected_facility_charge_opportunity: Implant or supply-related charge when separately captured
common_failure_mode: Clinical usage documented but not reconciled to charge workflow
why_it_may_not_be_billable: The item may be integral to the procedural package rather than separately billable

department: OR / Hospital Outpatient Surgery / Procedural Areas
performed_activity_evidence: Case log or room log with timestamp-dependent support
required_documentation_elements: Case start, case stop, room or procedure timestamp support
common_failure_mode: Case-log timestamps are missing or incomplete for the procedural charge
why_it_may_not_be_billable: Case activity may not support the procedural charge without governed timestamp evidence
